name: Lawrence Co. Youth Soccer Complex
description: Lawrence Co. Youth Soccer Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisa, KY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: No Limit Fitness
description: No Limit Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Louisa, KY. There is 1 indoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to food and restrooms.
